name: Media.io - AI Video, Image & Music Generator

keyFeatures.en: Create videos, images and music with AI in one online studio.
keyFeatures.zh: 在一个在线工作室中使用AI创建视频、图像和音乐.

keyFeatures.en: Generate, edit and share viral content with powerful AI tools for creators and teams.
keyFeatures.zh: 使用强大的AI工具为创作者和团队生成、编辑和分享病毒式内容.

description.en: No credit limit, up to 10MB file size, commercial use allowed.
description.zh: 无积分限制，最大10MB文件大小，允许商业使用.

weaknesses.en: Limited features and credits in the free tier.
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐功能和积分有限.

weaknesses.en: No detailed pricing information for paid tiers.
weaknesses.zh: 未提供付费套餐的详细价格信息.

targetAudience.en: Creators and teams who want to generate, edit and share viral content with powerful AI tools.
targetAudience.zh: 希望使用强大AI工具生成、编辑和分享病毒式内容的创作者和团队.

positioning.en: Media.io positions itself as a one-stop solution for creators and teams to create, edit, and share viral content using AI tools.
positioning.zh: Media.io 将自己定位为创作者和团队使用AI工具生成、编辑和分享病毒式内容的一站式解决方案.
